specific_location: KCR 52 just north of KCR M
description: I never heard the bird call for sure.  There were LALOs calling and picking out the SMLO amongst the chatter as they would flush and land was just not happening.  When I first saw the bird I immediately knew it was not a LALO just by the very buffy appearance.  My initial thought was Smith's but certainly needed to rule out other species, mainly CCLO.  The bright white wingbar(s), only one was really visible, stood out in favor of SMLO, and when the bird flew and landed it clearly had just two white outer tail feathers, see photos.
